narrative.context: You send a voice note quickly. The other person replies: 'Why are you angry?' You didn’t intend anger.
narrative.prompt: What understanding best helps you handle this?

options.label: Acknowledge perception and clarify intent
options.description: Understand that tone can be misread. Reply: 'I wasn’t angry—just rushed. Sorry it sounded that way.'

ei.rationale: Understands how emotion signals can be misinterpreted across channels; addresses both intent and impact.

options.label: Explain your situation only
options.description: Say you were busy, without acknowledging their experience.

ei.rationale: Clarifies context but may miss their emotional interpretation; partial understanding.
Misunderstands emotional perception differences; increases conflict.

options.label: Escalate with a defensive tone
options.description: Reply angrily: 'I’m not angry, stop accusing me.'

ei.rationale: Turns misunderstanding into conflict; poor emotional meaning-making.
